debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ ∃ C, ∀ (x : ℝ), ‖f x‖ ≤ C

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf zero_lt_one
  obtain ⟨x₀, _, hx₀⟩ := isCompact_Icc.exists_forall_le (Set.nonempty_Icc.mpr hl.pos.le)
    hf.uniformContinuous.continuous.norm.continuousOn
  refine ⟨‖f x₀‖ + 1, fun x ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hτ⟩ := hl (-x)
  calc
    ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f y‖ + ‖f x - f y‖ := norm_le_add_norm_sub _ _
    _ = ‖f y‖ + ‖f y - f x‖ := by rw [norm_sub_rev]
    _ ≤ ‖f x₀‖ + 1 := add_le_add (hx₀ y (Set.Ico_subset_Icc_self hy)) (by simpa using hτ x)

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf zero_lt_one
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := (isCompact_Icc.image hf.uniformContinuous.continuous.continuousOn).isBounded.subset_ball 0
  refine ⟨M + 1, fun x ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hAP⟩ := hl (-x)
  calc
    ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f x - f y‖ + ‖f y‖ := norm_sub_add_le _ _
    _ = ‖f (x + (-x + y)) - f x‖ + ‖f y‖ := by ring_nf; rw [norm_sub_rev]
    _ ≤ 1 + M := by
      gcongr
      · exact hAP x
      · exact mem_closedBall_zero_iff.1 (hM (Set.mem_image_of_mem _ (Set.Ico_subset_Icc_self hy)))

  obtain ⟨y, hy, hτ⟩ := hl (-x)
  calc
    ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f y‖ + ‖f x - f y‖ := norm_le_insert' _ _
    _ ≤ C + 1 := add_le_add (hC _ (Set.mem_image_of_mem _ (Set.Ico_subset_Icc_self hy)))
      (by simpa [neg_add_cancel_left, norm_sub_rev] using hτ x)
